Royal Queen Seeds Candy Kush Express (Fast version) Feminized Marijuana Seeds Generally, even strains that combine a Sativa and an Indica background tend to lean heavily towards one side or the other in both genetic background and effect. ï»¿ï»¿However, Candy Kush Express FAST Version is unique even amongst Indica/Sativa hybrids: at 40 percent sativa and 60 percent Indica, this Kush strain is about as close to a true, evenly mixed hybrid that there is available. This translates to a unique blend of both Indica and Sativa effects. The Sweet Special strain is part of Candy Kushâs direct genetic background. Among other things, this strain is known for a sweet taste and hearty, durable plants. These assets translate to Candy Kush, as the plants are physically sturdy for growing indoors or out, and the taste is always pleasingly sweet. The legendary Royal Kush is the other genetic parent of Candy Kush. Royal Kush is a famously Indica-heavy strain, being descended itself from the inexpressibly potent Afghani Kush. Both Afghani and Royal Kush are prized amongst insomniacs for their sedative effects, and more casual and/or recreational smokers note the heavy âcouch-lockâ present in these strains. Since this strain does have slightly more Indica in its genetic background, a strong physical stoniness is present. However, the Sativa element of this strain shows itself in a heady, soaring euphoria. The Sativa aspects of Candy Kush help balance the effects, giving the soothing effects an unusual yet welcome energetic quality. This variety is gaining popularity for its unique blend of uplifting and deeply relaxing effects. The most effective medical uses of this strain are stress and pain relief. The low CBD content helps regulate the sedating effect, meaning that this strain has the capacity to relax without completely knocking users out. It is notable that even with low CBD, the THC content of this strain weighs in at a very hefty 18 percent, making it one of the more potent varieties available. If grown outdoors, these plants yield at least 450 dried grams or up to 500 grams per plant if grown outdoors, or 475 to 525 dried grams when grown indoors. Since this is a Fast Version flowering takes only seven weeks. When growing outdoors it is best to schedule for an early September harvest. When fully grown, the plants will reach a height of up to 100 centimetres indoors, or up to 170 metres outdoors. Like all Fast Versions, these Candy Kush plants make for an easy growing process. Even novice growers will find that it is surprisingly easy to quickly yield dense, high-quality buds with through a straightforward growing process. Candy Kush Express FAST Version is ideal for growers who are interested in an unusually balanced strain that is easy to grow quickly in either indoor or outdoor conditions. Genetics: Sweet Special x Royal Kush Flowering Time: 49 - 63 Days Sex: Feminized Type: 40% Sativa / 60% Indica Area: Indoor and Outdoor Height Indoor: 60 - 100cm Height Outdoor: 100 - 170cm THC: 18% CBD: Low

Be warned as some might find this overwhelming. Cannabis indica plants have higher CBD and lower THC levels and their high is considered to be heavier and sleepy

Big Buddha Cheese (Cheese x Cheese Reversed) This Cheese is a unique strain and until now has only been available as clone form only. Like many cannabis strains the history and origins of Cheese are somewhat confused and distorted. Cheese cannabis originated in 1988-89 as one unique female phenotype out of packet of Sensi Seeds Skunk No. 1 grown somewhere in the Chiltern Hills. This one marijuana plant produced massive buds and had a very distinctive cheesy odour. It was quickly cloned and named Cheese. For many years Cheese has passed around the underground network of growers in the UK, helped by Exodus and others, until one clone came into the hands of the Big Buddha. Big Buddha realised its importance and set about crossing the clone with a suitable father. Big Buddha Cheese cannabis seeds have an appealing fruity fresh aroma, uplifting effect and is highly pungent hence its name! Genetics: California Orange x Big Buddha Cheese Type: 85% Indica / 15% Sativa Indoor Flowering: 63 - 77 days Outdoor Flowering: End of October Indoor Yield: 80 g/m2 Outdoor Yield: 350 g/plant

During its flowering stage, which spans approximately 63-70 days, Choco Cream develops into a sight to behold, exuding beauty and vigor. Indoor growers can anticipate a bountiful yield ranging from 450 to 550 grams per square meter, while outdoor cultivators can expect an even more impressive harvest of 500 to 750 grams per plant. Choco Cream entices the senses with its delectable flavor profile, characterized by rich notes of chocolate, intertwined with hints of diesel, creating a symphony of indulgence with every inhale. Prepare for a journey of relaxation and euphoria as Choco Cream's potent THC levels, ranging from 27% to 30%, deliver a cerebral buzz that gradually transitions into a soothing, tranquilizing effect. Indulge in the decadence of Choco Cream and discover a new level of cannabis sophistication that satisfies the body, mind, and palate. Chocobang Cannabis Seeds by Delicious Seeds Created from one of the best genes in California, the Chocobang is a perfect combo of two outstanding strains from Delicious Seeds library. Worth a special mention is the fact that THC levels can hit above 26% in order to provide long-lasting excitement and happiness. Strain: Chocolate Orange  Cannabis  - Homegrown Cannabis Co.
Description: Relax into a citrus-chocolate paradise with Chocolate Orange feminized seeds, a match made in heaven, especially for those who enjoy unique flavor combinations. Choccy Orange is a vivid tapestry of taste and aroma, blending the sharp, sunny bursts of Tangie with the deep, indulgent essence of Chocolope. Yet, there's a comforting warmth underlying it all, thanks to the chocolate notes, rounding out the experience with a touch of relaxation that doesnât overpower or sedate. Itâs a daytime delight that keeps you motivated, inspired, and enveloped in a blissful state of mental clarity and serenity. Ideal for the connoisseur who appreciates the fine nuances of a truly gourmet cannabis experience.Growing Chocolate Orange feminized seedsTo help create the fantastic Choccy Orange experience, this plant shows vigorous growth with the potential for significant yields. Expect her to stretch, so if you're cultivating indoors, you'll want to have strategies in place for height managementâthink topping or employing a Screen of Green (SCROG) to encourage lateral growth.Chocolate Orange thrives in well-ventilated areas with consistent light, showing a particular fondness for a sunny, Mediterranean climate when grown outdoors. Her resilience to pests and mold makes her a good choice for growers of all levels, but keep an eye on nutrient levels to avoid overwhelming her.This plantâs ability to blend the sharp, uplifting terpenes of Tangie with the grounding, earthy notes of Chocolope results in a cultivation experience as rewarding as the complex aromas filling your grow space. Sheâs ideal for those seeking to expand their palette while growing something truly, truly special.  Cannabis affects everyone differently. Chronic's Kush F2 Cannabis Seeds by Conscious Genetics Overview: Chronicâs Kush F2 is a powerhouse strain that stands out for fans of gassy genetics. A cross of two legendary OG Kush strains, OG Kush and Hell Raiser OG, this hybrid delivers exceptional potency and perfectly balanced effects. With its unique combination of relaxation and euphoria, Chronic Kush F2 has quickly become a favuorite among seasoned users and OG Kush enthusiasts. Genetics: The Chronic Kush F2 is the result of an expert cross between the classic Chronicâs Kush and Hell Raiser OG. The Chronic Kush lineage, known for its earthy, piney aroma and sedating effects, pairs seamlessly with Hell Raiser OG, a cup-winning OG Kush strain renowned for its uplifting and creative cerebral effects. This pairing results in a strain that offers a perfect blend of mental clarity and relaxing body buzz. Appearance: Chronicâs Kush F2 grows into medium-sized plants adorned with dense, chunky buds. These buds are covered in a heavy layer of resin, showcasing deep forest green hues mixed with purple undertones and vibrant orange pistils, making for an eye-catching and frosty appearance. Aroma & Flavour: The aroma of Chronic Kush F2 is a rich blend of earthy pine, citrus zest, and deep diesel gas, with a strong classic OG Kush scent thatâs both nostalgic and invigorating. On the flavour front, expect bold lemon-pine notes combined with diesel undertones and a spicy, earthy finish, delivering a robust and memorable experience with every inhale. Specifications: Genetics: Chronic's Kush x Chronic's Kush (OG Kush x Hell Raiser OG) Flowering Time: 9 Weeks Yield: Medium- High

Mosca Seeds Cinderella 99 BX-1 Cannabis Seeds Medicinal Properties Reportedly good for ADD and with little to no build up in tolerance. The C99 BX-1 is the result of recombining two distinctly different Cinderella 99 inbred lines and then backcrossing one generation which gives rise to a consistent phenotype. It was primarily bred for indoor cultivation but great results have been reported outside. This strain produces extremely high yielding monsters with tight, solid buds when grown properly. Bros Grimm Cinderella 99 description: This strains may be the "Holy Grail". Cinderella 99 is the result of painstakingly backcrossing a very rare female to her male progeny over 3 generations. Short-statured & heavily branched, this plants grows long, dense colas with an extremely high flower/leaf ratio and outrageous resin production. The breeder has observed a "giant leap" in potency with each progressive generation and, as expected. Cinderella 99 has topped all previous results - her high is heavily influenced by Haze, clear, energetic & devastatingly psychoactive. A plant with all of the above is rare enough, but Cinderella 99 finished flowering after a scant 50 days. Above average yields of crystal covered buds reeking of Pineapple & tropical fruit aromas

Citron Snacks Cannabis Seeds by SubCools The Dank Seeds By not jumping on to the 'Cookies Craze' at the first possible opportunity, Subcool ensures that nothing but stable genetics have gone into this cross. They have carefully selected their Cookies and Cream mother to carry the genetics on their new line and in this instance, a Jack the Ripper male was used in this cross as they wanted to carry through both the medical benefits and his lemon terpenes to create a truly unique 'lemon cookie dough' profile. We have a succulent blend of cookie dough and vanilla beans that is also heavy on lemons and cream. The effects that this strain delivers is a nice head and body high, with uplifting and painkilling effects. In terms of growth, harvests can be pulled in 63 days. She grows with vigour and a lovely structure, producing unusually big buds for a cookies strain, but what isn't out of the ordinary is the abundant terpenes and resin glands that this strain is just dripping in. Genetics: Cookies & Cream x Jack The Ripper Sativa/Indica: 50%/50% Flowering Time: 58 - 63 days Yield: Large Height: Medium/Tall Flavour: Vanilla lemon cookie dough High type: Strong uplifting head & body high

AUTO AK Triple Haze Cannabis Seeds By Super Sativa Seed Club Three outstanding genetics meet in this cross; award-winning Karel's Haze, well-known AK47, and powerful Haze Dominant Auto. Super Sativa Seed Club crossed those 3 high-THC strains to offer you something special - Auto AK Triple Haze. A super easy-to-grow Haze dominant autoflower that provides great yield in speed time (10-11 weeks from seed to harvest). For such a productive and high-quality strain, a 10-week grow cycle from autoflower seed to harvest is impressive. Indoors, you can expect a rather smaller-sized plant with a height of up to 100cm with yields of 400-500g/m2. Outdoors, she can grow to over 150cm with lots of side branches, providing 150 grams per plant, which is easy to achieve. It also has an amazing taste, which is sweet and fruity, and brings to mind the taste of wild forest fruits and berries. The fresh sweet smelling buds are jam-packed with resin making her a sticky feast during harvest. The THC levels can be reached even over 25%. As it is a Sativa dominant hybrid, you can expect effects typical for this type of herb. The high is intense, euphoric, and uplifting, with an energetic vibe. This makes her ideal for those with an active lifestyle, those that love the great outdoors, or those with engaging hobbies. A higher dosage though may bring more physical high which results in losing the bright/sharp Sativa effects and producing a heavy/intense but still incredibly satisfying effect. Black Lebanon Cannabis Seeds by Super Sativa Seed Club A real treat for the ones looking for old school strains. Original Black Lebanon, dating back from the 80's, was crossed with the Blackberry male to stabilise it. The best and closest to the Original Lebanon individuals have been selected from this breeding project, taking into account the quality, taste, potency, yield and effect. This Black Lebanon is one of the strongest landrace strains from Lebanon that is naturally resistant to high temperatures and dry climates, thanks to its parents genetics. The genetics background is very strong, with impressive yields, resin levels and bud production. It grows into a very dark green plant with leaves showing purple colours, some even nearly black. The amazing appearance is finished with glittering white resinous trichomes which makes a spectacular contrast against the dark colours of the plant. Blackberry has added the fruity flavour into the classic Lebanon, making it more flavoursome with less of an earthy taste. CoCoa Regular Cannabis Seeds bu DJ Short DJ Short Cocoa Kush is a structurally Kush hybrid of a cross between a female `Blueberry Sativa` (from the exact same seed stock that produced the mother of the Blue Satellite; the mother of the Cocoa Kush being large with some variegation and lavender/blue huesâespecially on the undersides of dark leaves on an asymmetric plant often with no discernable main-stem and long side-branchesâreminiscent of the original Chocolate Thai both structurally and experientially) crossed with the Original Blueberry male (a stretch-indica). This Cocoa Kush quasi-hybrid grows medium-height Kush-like plants with short nodes, large, dark-green foliage, thick-yet-sturdy hollow stems and tight-yet-elongated buds of swollen calyx/bract flowers completely coated in large, clear trichome of superior aromatics. Flower time is approx. 55â60 days, with the more interesting oils developing in the very last week. DJ Short Cocoa Kush possesses a complex-yet-subtle palate of a nutty/licorice/chocolate/tobacco blend with a creamy/floral/fruity background. The experience of the finished product is of top-shelf quality; smooth, yet with a bit more intense, `take-your-breath-away` (almost overpowering) initial experience that mellows finally to a sleepy/dreamy finish. Upon final testing, a few individual plants from the Cocoa Kush provided an experience and structural aesthetic very similar to the Blue Velvet; i.e. dense, large calyx, lavender foxtail buds that produce a very exciting-yet-sedate experience. Please note: approx. 15% of the plants from this line will sport variegated growth patterns. The other 85% will grow uniform plants with slight variation in height. Extended vegetative time coupled with early topping is recommended to increase yield, or run un-topped in a SOG-type system

Bud originMandarine auto cannabis seeds produce indica-dominant crops highly coveted for their refreshing tropical fragrance.This marijuana cultivar is a potent hybrid birthed from two powerhouses: Ice Cool and Cream Caramel auto. Aim for moderate humidity, higher in the early stages compared to the maturity phase thatâs more susceptible to mold.This autoflower is fairly flexible, mostly tolerating humidity and temperature variations. Although this adaptability is a plus, aiming for the recommended growing conditions gives you a healthier crop and a larger yield.Feeding Cream Mandarine autoflowerTo maximize autoflower yields, correct plant feeding is paramount. The crops grown from Mandarine cannabis seeds demand specific nutrient portions in every phase.At the seedling stage, provide a well-balanced fertilizer with equal nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium concentrations. Aim for an NPK ratio of around 10-10-10 or 5-5-5 for starters. these buds are also crammed full of therapeutic benefits thatâll see you feel like youâre living on cloud 9 the whole time.Flavor and Fragrance of Critical x Cream Cheese AutoflowerProving that the way in which theterpene profiletranslates is truly where the magic lies,Critical x Cream Cheese Autoflowerpresents tokers with a genuinely unique, albeit still somewhat divisive, flavor and fragrance experience.The skunkiness one expects from your typicalSkunkstrain is absolutely more on theCheeseside of the family tree than anything else, but thereâs a certain edge to both the nose and tongue which might catch most fans off-guard.Alongside thedecadent creamy cheesinessthe aroma promised, the more refined palate can detect hints of citrus lingering in the background, occasionally leaping to the foreground and delivering an exquisitely juxtaposing sweet sourness to the mix.It may sound odd, but lovers ofCheesestrains alongside the dedicatedSkunkfandom (and the likes of thoseDieseldisciples) have long since abandoned any preconceptions of what cannabis âshouldâ taste like - Itâs pretty easy to invite side effects like dry mouth, red-eye or mild dizziness with this stuff and that can be discombobulating for anyone not expecting it.Donât overindulge and stay hydrated throughout and youâll get on just great.Medical Uses of Critical x Cream Cheese AutoflowerDespite having a low CBD content of 0.3% and high THC hitting upwards of 20%,Critical x Cream Cheese Autocomes with an abundance of therapeutic benefits just waiting for anyone with the tolerance to handle the high.For those with low THC tolerance hoping to bask in these benefits, pay close attention to your dosage control, stay hydrated and donât overindulge or things could getveryinterestingâ¦Boasting all the anxiolytic, analgesic, anti-inflammatory, anti-depressant and anti-emetic properties that have made marijuana famous among medical communities,Critical x Cream Cheese Autofloweris regularly turned to for some THC therapy by patients with both physical and mental maladies, from the mild to the more severe cases.Stress, anxiety and depression are reduced to the tiny monsters they truly are when under this strainâs influence, locked away and unable to even touch your buzz.Of course, being a heavily Indica hybrid with a potent physical kick, youâll likely find itâs in the relief from palpable aches and pains that this stuff really comes into its own as therapeutic marijuana.As the high draws out or intensifies, even the most chronic of conditions can fall from concern, entirely overshadowed by your new sense of serenity and sedation. At this stage, the anti-emetic agents are in full swing, inciting a ravenous hunger and quelling nausea- the perfect remedy for a loss of appetite.And when allâs said and done, even a patient with the worst case of insomnia would struggle to keep their eyelids from drooping and finally closing as the Sandmanâs sleepy spell lures you in for a restful end to your night.Growing Critical x Cream Cheese Autoflower SeedsThe Indica andautofloweringgenetics of this hybrid makes cultivatingCritical x Cream Cheese Autoone of the simplest growing experiences you can imagine.These beauties remain small enough to grow happily in pretty much any environment, rarely reaching more than 1 meter as a maximum. These plants can fend off common plant problems without breaking a sweat, and will thrive in any environment, though prefer warm Mediterranean climates - and itâs better to imitate these with an indoor setup than to actually opt for an outdoor grow.If you live in Spain, Italy, California or similar though then go nutsâ¦ just donât expect the biggest possible yields.If you do swing for an indoor cultivation setup, youâll want to consider carbon filters - ifodor controlis of particular concern to you that isâ¦ or let the whole neighborhood enjoy these pungent delights if youâre feeling generous.When it comes tocultivation medium, most growers tend towards hydroponics to help maximize their output come harvest time, but thatâs absolutely a preference choice. Organic soil works well to boost terpene production if youâre more interested in the best taste, aroma and therapeutic properties.After roughly 10 weeks, itâs time to harvest yourCritical x Cream Cheese Autocrop - indoor growers can reap up to 500 grams per meter squared for their efforts (especially if aSea of Green, or SoG, setup is used), while outdoor crops tend towards around 100 to 150 grams per plant.SummaryNot one for the wake and bake -Critical x Cream Cheese Autofloweris a powerfully potent and pungent specimen of supreme stinkiness that even seasoned recreational tokers should take care not to underestimate.Boasting insane amounts of old-school bag appeal, this hybrid is stupidly simple to grow and a surefire way for everyone from novice grower to commercial cultivator to stock up on some high-quality THC-heavy nugs. Gaia F1 Cannabis Seeds by Royal Queen Seeds Overview Gaia F1 has earned its place among the elite in the world of F1 hybrid cannabis genetics. Born from a meticulous breeding process involving the robust parent strains New Breed Auto, Black Domina, and Sin Tra Bajo, this powerhouse variety emerged after an extensive project that brought together three pure inbred lines. The result is a uniform, high-performing autoflower that offers exceptional resistance to pests and diseases, tailor-made for growers seeking reliability and quality. Named after the Greek goddess of Earth, Gaia F1 invites you to reconnect with the natural world. Her terpene-rich aroma and potent effects inspire a deep sense of peace and presence. After just a few tokes, you may find yourself yearning for the serenity of a forest path or the quiet magic of a garden, seeing not just plants and soil, but a vibrant, living ecosystem teeming with life. Each puff cultivates awareness, grounding you in the beauty of your surroundings. Flavours, Aromas, and Effects Gaia F1 boasts a terpene profile as rich and diverse as nature itself. Bursting with myrcene, terpinolene, caryophyllene, and pinene, her resin-drenched buds produce a deeply soothing and stoning effectâperfect for winding down after a long day or enhancing slow moments spent in stillness. The flavour is a symphony of pineapple, citrus, and mint, creating a mouthwatering, nuanced experience that keeps you coming back. Growth Traits Whether youâre a seasoned cultivator or just getting started, Gaia F1 offers a hassle-free grow. Her F1 genetics deliver near-identical phenotypes every time, with compact plants that fit easily into any space. Indoors or out, trained or untrained, Gaia F1 reaches a modest heightâaround 70 cm untrained and 50 cm with trainingâmaking her ideal for stealth grows or limited room. Expect generous yields of aromatic, trichome-heavy buds just 10 weeks after germination. Genetics: New Breed Auto x Black Domina x Sin Tra bajo Type: F1 Hybrid auto Flowering time: 40 - 45 days Harvest: 65 - 70 days after germination Yield: XXL Height: 50 - 70 cm Major terpenes: Caryophyllene, Myrcene, Terpinolene Flavour: Citrus, Mint, Pineapple Effect: Physically Relaxing, Sleepy, Stoned THC: Very high CBD: Low

Galactic Rainbow Cannabis Seeds by Wizard Trees Galactic Rainbow is an extraordinary hybrid strain, combining the best qualities of Pluto and RS11 to create a truly unique experience. This strain is known for its remarkable visual appeal, featuring dense, compact nugs that boast a vibrant spectrum of colours, much like a rainbow in the galaxy. Galaxy Brain Cannabis Seeds by Night Owl Seeds Overview Galaxy Brain is a classic strain that has made a triumphant return after its last seed run. This sativa-dominant hybrid is renowned for producing large, vigorous plants with heavy resin production from the ground up. With its potent combination of sweet fruit aromas and intensely flavorful terpene profiles, Galaxy Brain delivers a soaring cerebral high accompanied by a soothing body relaxation. However, the physical effects remain mild enough to keep you productive throughout the day. Upon its initial release, this strain quickly earned a reputation as a must-have among autoflowering connoisseurs â and it continues to impress. Appearance Galaxy Brain is a visually stunning plant with an impressive structure. It grows tall and branchy, with dense, resin-coated buds that glisten under the light. The calyxes are extraordinarily fat, providing ample surface area for resin glands to thrive. When the buds are broken apart, they reveal a sticky, sappy texture that showcases the strainâs high trichome production. As the plant matures, it develops striking hues, enhancing its visual appeal even further. Flavour & Aroma This strain boasts a powerful and complex terpene profile dominated by sweet fruit notes. When the buds are cracked open, they release an intensely pungent, mouthwatering aroma that fills the room with fruity funk. The flavour is just as rich, coating the palate with layers of tropical sweetness and a subtle yet lingering dankness. Every inhale and exhale is a treat, making Galaxy Brain a delight for cannabis enthusiasts who appreciate bold, expressive flavours. Effects Galaxy Brain delivers a fast-acting cerebral rush that lifts the mind into a state of heightened focus, creativity, and euphoria. The uplifting head effects are balanced by a gentle body relaxation that melts away tension without inducing lethargy. This makes it an excellent choice for daytime use, whether you're tackling creative projects, socializing, or simply enjoying an elevated state of mind. Despite its potency, the strain remains functional, allowing users to stay engaged and productive. Specifications Genetics: Zamaldelica Express F4 x Cosmic Queen F4S1 *Super Sativa* Flowering Time: 75-85 Days from Sprout Yield: 2-4 ounces

The Real Seed Company Garhwali The Real Seed Company Garhwali Genetics Jungli (Wild) Himalayan Charas Line Grows Greenhouse, Grows outdoors Harvest Month Early October Product Description A very nice wild ("jungli") variety from the high mountains around the Ganges Valley in the Indian Himalaya, selected with the help of respected Shiv-Shakti sadhus (wandering ascetics) in this sacred pilgrimage region. This particular jungli line grows around Aayana Devi mountain, a peak sacred to a compassionate white-coloured form of the Mother Goddess. The Real Seed Company Garhwali Shiva Seeds The Real Seed Company Garhwali Shiva Seeds plants are very resinous, with spice and incense aromas. As well as its euphoric resins, this strain is likely to have a good proportion of plants with CBD content. Contrary to urban myth, CBD is not a sedative, but instead gives focus and centering to the buzz, as well as a clean finish to a high. CBD has been shown to have a multitude of positive medicinal effects. Medical users and breeders may benefit from investigating these plants, which have a long history of medicinal use

Garlic Cookies Cannabis Seeds by Pure Instinto Seeds Garlic Cookies AKA GMO Cookies. Two outstanding genetics meet in this cross - Chemdawg and Girl Scout Cookies. This plant has it all: a great quantity of resin even in secondary leaves, dense and heavy flowers, and a powerful Kush aroma with delicious fruity touches. Its dominant terpene is caryophyllene, which provides spicy and herbal flavours. She starts you off with a euphoric beginning but very relaxing and perfect for dealing with pain. Its dominant Indica leaning effects make this strain best suited for night use as it can be extremely couch-locking. A robust, well-branched plant with medium-high internodal distance and light green, spade-shaped buds that are dusted with white trichomes and orange hairs. It isn't a very heavy producer but the quality of the flowers is worth the effort. Garlic Mist Cannabis Seeds by Royal Queen Seeds Garlic Mist is a cross between Original Garlic Bud and 100% Cali Sativa Haze. Gary Payton Cannabis Seeds by Barney's Farm Seeds Gary Payton is a hybrid named in honor of the legendary US basketball player. This multiple cannabis cup winner is a testament to the art of cannabis breeding, blending the genetics of the infamous Y Griega and Snowman strains. Gary Payton is a slightly sativa-dominant hybrid that has rapidly gained acclaim for its exceptional quality, distinctive flavour profile, robust harvest potential, and well-balanced effects. The buds of Gary Payton are a captivating tapestry of deep greens and purples, generously coated with trichomes that give them a frosted appearance. The striking contrast of colours hints at the complexity and depth this strain offers. Aromatic notes of spicy herbs and pungent diesel, coupled with sweet berry undertones, create an enticing olfactory experience, setting the stage for a remarkable cannabis journey. Its flavour is as memorable as its aroma, offering a symphony of tastes. Earthy undertones blend seamlessly with spicy and sweet notes, providing a multifaceted taste that lingers pleasantly on the palate. This harmonious flavour profile makes Gary Payton a favorite among those who appreciate a rich and robust cannabis experience. In terms of effects, Gary Payton stands in a league of its own. With a consistent THC content of 25% or higher, this strain delivers a balanced and happy feeling that satisfies both mind and body. Users can expect an initial cerebral rush, providing a burst of energy and heightened focus, followed by a soothing body high that eases tension and promotes relaxation without inducing overwhelming sedation. When it comes to cultivation process, Gary Payton exhibits vigorous growth and resilience, adapting well to various growing conditions. The plants are characterized by their robust structure and incredible yield potential. While it demands attention and care, the result is a bountiful harvest of high-quality buds, up to 700g/mÂ² indoors and up to 1kg per plant outdoors making the effort well worth it. Flowering time indoors allow 65-70 days, outdoor our Gary Payton strain will finish by mid-October. This strain delivers the perfect equilibrium of uplifting cerebral energy and deep physical relaxation â making it a must-try hybrid for cannabis connoisseurs. Gas Line Cannabis Seeds by Conscious Genetics Overview Gas Line is a powerhouse cannabis strain that masterfully blends two legendary old-school hybrids. Gasberry Cannabis Seeds by In House Genetics Overview: Gasberry is a premium hybrid strain resulting from the fusion of the legendary Permanent Urkle and the flavourful Black Cherry Smoothie. Glueberry Cannabis Seeds By Black Farm Genetix Glueberry is a cannabis strain that is primarily Indica dominant, and its genetics originate from the Hash making regions of Hindu Kush and Afghanistan. While Glueberry from BFG is considered a medium-difficulty strain to grow, a bit of patience is required as it takes about 10 weeks to finish flowering. Lemon Miracle Cannabis Seeds By Black Farm Genetix Lemon Miracle is a predominantly Indica strain, with approximately 60% Indica genetics originating mainly from the Hindu Black Farm Genetics and Southern Regions of India. It also has some Sativa genetics from Durban Poison, originating from Malawi South Africa, and a small amount of Thai Sativa. Lemon Miracle finishes flowering in approximately 8-9 weeks, which is relatively short for the photoperiod strain. The plants are rather short with an adaptable and easy-to-grow structure. The buds have exotic shading which makes them unique and striking. As the temperature drops toward the end of the growth cycle, the leaves and buds will display beautiful purple and blueish hues. Additionally, this herb is highly resinous and sticky to the touch. No doubt, the bag appeal will be top-notch. Expect sweet and savoury smells of berry mint lime cookies and a nice Kush flavour. And if you are looking for a sedative effect on the body without completely knocking you out, Lemon Miracle will be a great choice. With its dreamy, relaxing effect, Lemon Miracle has the power to whisk away your troubles and bring you a sense of calm. This strain is particularly well-suited for early evening use, as it can help you unwind without causing drowsiness. It will also work well as a muscle relaxer. KC Brains KC 42 Cannabis Seeds KC Brains KC42 is a mostly sativa marijuana hybrid of a New Zealand and KC 639 males represented by K.C. Brains. She became a successful result of KC Brains seed breeding experiments, and one more unique strain to come to life. Being sativa dominated, KC 42 cannabis strains behave like a typical sativa. Her seeds produce tall thin plant with narrow, light green leaves and chunky, thick buds. Her average size can reach up to 2.5 m when grown outside; however, inside varieties of this marijuana keep their height under control and won't stretch taller than 170 cm. It take KC42 sativa a bit longer to grow and mature; she also require more light. Medicine produced from this cannabis lower CBD and higher THC counts which produces a more clear headed, energetic type of high. The flowering stage lasts between 9 to 12 weeks outside and just 6 to 9 weeks indoor. Wherever you want your strain to grow, she shows excellent result either a part of a green group or as an individual plant. Her New Zealand ancestors gave her some characteristics of a traditional cannabis landrace. Came from countries with quite a mild climate, KC 42 cannabis seeds are highly resistant to mushrooms and plague and quite tolerant to irrigation. After a flowering period, enriched with a smell of fresh citrus and light hash, first buds come up, making the smell more intense. Aromatic, sugary, aminoacids and cannabinoids marijuana buds are ready for a harvest after a short maturing period. KC 42 buds are said to produce double THC and make it as high as 20-22%. These cannabis seeds are great yielders - an average outside yield is unbelievably high - around 1300 gr.of dried product per plant; you can start your harvest at the end of October and carry out through November. Indoor plants will give you as much as 150 gr. per plant. The product has a long shelf life. Like any other sativas, KC 42 have high content of THCs and little CBD, it brings cerebral, soaring type of high, more energetic, creative and active, a true party must. Genetics: KC 639 & New Zealand strain Type: Mostly Sativa Flowering time: 9 - 12 weeks Indoor / 9 - 14 weeks Outdoor Height: 170cm Indoor / 200 - 250cm Outdoor

Mandala Seeds Krystalica Cannabis Seeds The appearance of a delicious strawberry aroma in some of the plants, which enhances the already fruity properties of Krystalica! Everyone who has even remotely enjoyed our Satori will appreciate Krystalica as another essential connoisseur strain. She offers a great package deal that is hard to come by: impressive resin production, good yields, easy growing, and a superb high. Although both strains have features in common, the cannabinoids in Krystalica make up a distinctly different high. Satori can be too overwhelming for some smokers. Krystalica is smoother and less dramatic in the intial phase of the high, therefore especially appreciated by sensitive persons, or those prone to paranoia and anxiety. This is also a sativa with a relaxing effect that makes you want to slow down and enjoy. Whereas Satori is also suitable for energetic pursuits or partying, Krystalica is best smoked when you want to wind down but stay refreshed or creative at the same time. The medical applications for Krystalica are extensive since it has top THC levels with a very pleasant high to match. Krystalica can be grown indoor from seeds or clones. Use 400-600W HPS/m2 for best results because this is a high performance strain and may not flower well under low light. In hydroponics impressive yields can be expected â especially if you have selected a mother plant that brings the extra pounds on the scale. Long shoots extending from the bottom two internodes should be pruned in hydroponics or if your grow space is cramped. The remaining branches are of medium length but may require some support during late flowering if the buds become particularly heavy. It is usually sufficient to tie a thick string or gardening wire around the outside perimeter of the plant. The plants grow well in SOG and can be planted in close rows. With 4 weeks of vegetative growth under 400W HPS/m2 in quality soil you can expect the plants to reach a height between 70-110 cm. Use at least 5L/1 gallon containers for growth and 10L/2.5 gallon for flowering for plants from seed (clones can be raised in smaller containers). Bud development is unlike a typical sativa and quite dense with some plants exhibiting broad indica-type buds. Trichome production can reach amazing heights, extending to the sun leaves, so it pays to keep back-up clones and select the most spectacular individual as mother plant or for breeding projects

SnowHigh Seeds Panama Red x Lambs Bread A BCO Panama Red mother was combined with a heirloom Jamaican Lambs bread male. This is a pre-release of truly old heirloom genetics of long flowering duration. Extreme patience is needed to grow and finish the Panama Red x Lambs bread, this will probably be the last strain to show sex or finish during a growing season outdoors and most likely will need a greenhouse or supplemental lighting to finish. The genetics contain many equatorial sativa types with dominance in Panamanian/Colombian genotypes, flowering and finishing times are determined by its genetics over photoperiod. A good vegetative growth is required before flowering should be induced if indoors and 30 to 60 days is preferred and sometimes 90 days from seed optimally but required. In my experience allowing the plant from seed to mature fully before inducing flower will allow larger yields and less problems with growth and finishing further in its growth cycle. The Lambs bread line is a tightly kept strain which was preserved by Rastafarians for many years. Lambs bread was a favorite of Bob Marley which is said to be a hybrid of some of the first indentured Indian cannabis cultivars brought in from traveling sugar plantation workers in the 1800âs and other equatorial cannabis lines. Panama was once a department of Colombia with 2 provinces and many of the cannabis cultivars of Panama parallel Colombian cultivars for obvious reasons. Cuna Indians, Taino and other indigenous people of the âAmericasâ cultivated cannabis for religious and spiritual use and were linked with more northerly people as far as the Great Lakes region of North America and Mexico. Some of the red jungle cultivars famous for the Panama Red imports of the 60âs and 70âs possibly came from genetic sources from these people and the West African slave trade which focused around present day Angola and Senegal. Later West Indies indentured workers mainly from Barbados and other Caribbean islands came to build the Panama Canal probably brought in their cannabis cultivars from previous Indian indentured servants working the sugar plantations of the 1800âs in Jamaica and other Caribbean islands. This strain is not for the novice and should only be grown with experience or a lot of research and preparation to realize the full potential of the strain. Those who do partake in this strains journey will be transported back in time when cannabis enhanced the mind and creative thoughts and images manifested with chances of enlightenment and joy that is rarely perceived in most of todayâs cannabis strains. The highs are trippy, soaring, colorful, and intense which can be paranoid inducing even in those accustomed to potent cannabis. Sativas of this caliber are best enjoyed without consuming other cannabis strains which contain CBD which modulate the high or basically bind to the THC and other psychoactive cannabinoids and synergistic terpenoids. In some cases of cannabis use its best not to consume other CBD rich strains or narcotic pain medications because of the binding to the CB1 receptors which can decrease the perceived potency of the strain. Also consuming edibles will detract from the best expressions of sativa strains like Panama Red x Lambs bread

Main Squeeze Cannabis Seeds By Jinxproof Genetics Main Squeeze is an excellent hybridization between Main Event and Hell on Wheels. The outcome is Indica dominant hybrid which blooms in 58-62 days. Main Squeeze has 3 main phenotypes. They seem very similar during veg, and the first few weeks of bloom, but with time the differences are more visible. The size and structure of the plants is very similar among the phenos. The subtle differences appear in the shades of the flowers and leaf shapes. Pheno #1 produces very nice golf-ball chunky and resinous buds in dark purple colour, surrounded by deep purpling/blackening leaves. The leaf shape is wide shaped with deep saw blade serrations. Pheno #2 is much lankier with more stretch than the others. It is topped with spear-shaped buds covered in thick white pistols. This plant is purpling as well, but more of a deep merlot red. Pheno #3 is a combination of phenos 1 and 2. Its leaves are long and skinny. It has some purple shading. The bud structure is a bit of the golf ball and spear combo, but more like a grenade. There are also some variations in taste but overall, the smoke is very pleasant if you like sweet and gassy flavours. The effects are also very enjoyable. Main Squeeze is a heavy hitter, but with a perfect dosage, it will give you a euphoric feeling with deep body and mind relaxation. Medically, it will work perfectly as a pain, stress and anxiety relief. Treat yourself, you are worth it! Genetics: Main Event X Hell on Wheels Type: Indica dominant (75%- 70%) Indoor Flowering Time: 58-62 Days Yield: Heavy Flavour: Pheno 1: Straight GAS with a sweet pastry like undertone Pheno 2: Sweet berries and citrus with a slight hint of diesel Pheno 3: Very sweet, citrus Lime with hints of gas Effect: Very heavy and euphoric, relaxing, pain, stress and anxiety reliever

Mandarin Cookies V2 Cannabis Seeds by Ethos Genetics Genetic Background Mandarin Cookies V2 refines the celebrated original with a modern genetic twist. This version combines Ethos Cookies #12 and Mandarin Sunset R1, steering away from the classic Forum Cut lineage. The influence of OG Kush within Ethos Cookies #12 adds structure and density, while Mandarin Sunset contributes its vibrant citrus energy. The resulting hybrid expresses an intensified terpene profile, featuring bold mandarin-orange notes accented by a gassy edge and a touch of earthiness. Growth and Structure Mandarin Cookies V2 plants demonstrate aggressive, upright growth and a naturally dominant central cola. Reaching a medium stature overall, they form dense clusters of resin-rich blooms. Their internodes remain tight, encouraging strong branch formation and airflow, and the low leaf count simplifies both trimming and curing. Around one in five phenotypes may grow shorter but still yield visually impressive, terpene-heavy buds. Moderate stretching occurs during flowering, and light trainingâsuch as topping before pre-flowerâhelps keep the canopy balanced and productive. Flowering Time and Yield This cultivar matures quickly, completing its bloom cycle in 60 to 63 days. Despite its compact size, Mandarin Cookies V2 consistently delivers weighty, resin-glazed buds with substantial density. Its excellent flower-to-leaf ratio and heavy trichome coverage make it appealing for both high-end flower production and extraction. Flavour and Aroma Profile The terpene expression is a complex mix of sweet mandarin peel, grapefruit zest, and grape undertones layered over a potent gasoline and hash backbone. The aroma bursts with fresh citrus sweetness, while the smoke reveals a balance of tangy fruit and deep fuel notes that linger on the palate. This dynamic, punchy flavour profile has made Mandarin Cookies V2 a standout among flavour-focused cultivators. Cultivation Notes Easy to manage and versatile, Mandarin Cookies V2 performs reliably indoors and outdoors alike. It benefits from mild training techniques and early topping to prevent excess height. Its short flowering time, combined with its dense, aromatic output, makes it a rewarding choice for growers of any experience level. Under optimal conditions, the strain produces highly resinous, colorful flowers that highlight Ethos Geneticsâ precision breeding. Strain Characteristics Genetics: Ethos Cookies #12 x Mandarin Sunset R1 Flowering Time: 60-63 Days Type: Hybrid Yield: High Terpenes: Cutie Mandarins, Grapefruit & Grapes, Gas & Hash

Medusa F1 Cannabis Seeds by Royal Queen Seeds Medusa F1, unlike the legendary goddess after whom it's named, won't turn you to stone. However, it's bound to provide a euphoric high that you won't forget. The unique combination in this cross of Sugar Magnolia, a sweet Indica, and American Beauty, a fast and fruity hybrid known for its well-balanced high, results in a fresh and distinctive flavour, as well as a one-of-a-kind cannabinoid profile, and generous yields. In terms of appearance and cultivation, Medusa F1 seeds develop into tall, sturdy plants with long branches and well-spaced nodes. These plants typically grow up to 80-85 cm and have a short flowering period of only 42-45 days (72 days from germination to harvest). Thanks to its genetics, the Medusa F1 produces plenty of dense flowers with large calyxes, making pruning an easy task. Although it's resilient and can handle stress and unfavorable growing conditions, it's moderately susceptible to Botrytis cinerea, a fungus that causes grey mold. To prevent this, ensure you monitor the humidity in your growing room or garden. Another key point of Medusa is its intense aroma, which is reminiscent of fresh mint, with pepper and fresh fruit, berry, and fuel notes. In addition to the amazing scent, its dense, frosty flowers contain high levels of THC and CBG, as well as high concentrations of myrcene, ocimene, farnesene, and caryophyllene. As a result, Medusa F1 has a potent effect that relaxes and intoxicates the body from head to toe. Users also report enhanced creativity and motivation and an overall uplifting effect. The coloration is among the most striking in any modern strain â deep purple hues so rich they often appear black under low light, giving it an unmistakably exotic aesthetic. A thick coating of glittering trichomes wraps each bud, enhancing its overall bag appeal and hinting at its potency. The flavour profile of Mellowz is where it truly sets itself apart. On inhale, users are greeted with notes of ripe plum, dark berries, and juicy stone fruits, creating a deep, fruity sweetness. This evolves into a rich, candy-like finish, heavily reminiscent of its Grape Gasoline parent â a nod to its heritage and a treat for connoisseurs who favor rich, dessert-forward profiles. The flavour lingers long after consumption, offering a satisfying and memorable experience. SnowHigh Seeds Metal Dragon Metal Dragon is a combination of the now defunct Dutch Flowers Metal Haze with a well worked heirloom Burmese line. Dutch Flowers bred an indoor-friendly Haze strain that consistently delivered superior potency had been the very focus of Dutch Flowers breeding efforts since its inception. To that end, the team had collected and grown enough clones and crosses to setup a small Haze museum. Synthesizing the best Haze genetics into one line posed a considerable challenge. In early Dutch Flowers trials, proven clones passed down their potency genes on to the next generations using an unacceptable, unpredictable domino pattern. To develop a superior seed line, males were tested the hard way, growing out their offspring to recognize the best possible pollen source. Winning donors pollinated their choicest females, and their offspring was then heavily selected at the second generation. Recombinant individuals displaying the desired potency, phenotype, flowering and yield traits were identified and inbred into separate lines. Three years after the project begun, the resulting lines were finally blended, giving rise to Metal Haze, a hybrid that received high praise from skeptic industry testers. Named after the metal-lit room that keeps their Haze clone collection alive, Metal Haze displays the brain-warping quality that fueled the legend. It is a modern, trippy cerebral sativa, with classic psychoactive soar and scant body cues. Connoisseurs report a deadly, creeper with no ceiling, combination of effects. The phenotype is fully suitable for indoor growing, with a branching habit resulting in an abundance of dense, oily, attractive buds. Aromas range from animal sour spice to sweet piney mint, often accompanied by rotten meat undertones. Overindulging the Metal Haze is not recommended for the sativa sensitive or the inexperienced. It is a deceptively smooth smoke that starts out uplifting and super-active -ideal for musicians and creative types- and climbs ever higher in a succession of intense waves, taking perception to uncharted lands. Dutch Flowers bred Metal Haze to earn its place in discriminating gardens, and to satisfy demanding sativa aficionados. The Burmese in Metal Dragon is a broad leafed large central cola structured strain with a bushy structure that forms large resinous floral clusters. Burma now Myanmar is in close proximity to Yunnan China which is renowned for its broad leafed Chinese Indica strains. The Burmese is structured like a Chinese Indica but with an uplifting soaring high affect that people associate with equatorial lines or what is broadly referred to as Sativa. Metal Dragon brings the hard hitting sativa influence from the Metal Haze genetics while gaining size and girth from the Burmese side without it affecting the high type in a negative way. Flower time range 8 - 9 weeks Indica Structured Sativa hybrid Stretch 1 to 2x Resin production: High Odor: 8 Aroma: Grapefruit, Sweet Skunk, Rotten meat, Lemon Grass Flavor: 9 The flavor is potent terpene aromatic fuel which people are familiar with that are accustomed to high potency cannabis cultivars. This one tickles the nose from its aroma. Potency: 9 Duration of high: 3 to 4 hours High Type: An immediate body and soaring head high which is very potent and euphoric, clear up and visual but easily overdone if consumed too fast. Dry sieve of Metal Dragon will have you curled in the fetal position, hiding from cartoon monsters

Mint Candy Cannabis Seeds By Silent Seeds Overview Mint Candy is an exceptional limited-edition cannabis strain developed through an exclusive breeding project. This high-quality hybrid originates from a meticulous selection of Animal Bx1 and Face Mints genetics from Seedjunky Genetics, renowned for producing legendary strains like Wedding Cake and Jealousy. After an extensive selection process involving over 500 plants, SILENT SEEDS perfected a new elite strain by crossing Face Off OG Bx2 with the finest Animal Face Mints phenotype. The result is Mint Candy, a premium cultivar designed to satisfy even the most discerning growers and cannabis connoisseurs. Apperance Mint Candy is a vigorous hybrid that exhibits a tall, open-structured vegetative growth pattern. Indoor growers are advised to limit the vegetative stage to a maximum of three weeks due to its significant node spacing, which promotes excellent light penetration and airflow. Its large, moderately wide leaves contribute to its robust nature, while most phenotypes grow to substantial sizes. For indoor cultivation, maintaining proper height control and using support stakes during the last three weeks of flowering is recommended to handle the weight of its dense, resin-packed buds. High-Yielding Potential Mint Candy is a high-yielding strain with exceptional bud density and structure. Its open vegetative formation allows for optimal light exposure and efficient air circulation, promoting abundant flower production. Thanks to its elite genetic lineage, Mint Candy develops large, resinous buds with remarkable density and stunning purple hues toward the end of the flowering cycle. The trichome-rich flowers make this strain ideal for top-tier cannabis extractions and concentrates. With proper care, growers can expect generous harvests of premium-quality cannabis. Aroma & Flavour Profile Mint Candy offers an extraordinary sensory experience with its complex and intense terpene profile. Expect a unique blend of mint, gourmet cookie, lemon, gas, pine, and Kush-like (gassy) aromas, creating a refined and satisfying flavour palette. This strain is perfect for Kush enthusiasts and fans of Wedding Cake genetics, providing an aromatic experience that stays true to its prestigious lineage. Potent & Relaxing Effects Upon harvesting and proper curing, Mint Candy delivers a powerful effect that starts with an uplifting cerebral buzz, gradually transitioning into deep physical relaxation. This strain is perfect for unwinding after a long day, making it an excellent choice for evening or nighttime use. Designed for ultimate relaxation, Mint Candy provides a calming experience that soothes both mind and body, aligning with the new advanced standards of the modern cannabis industry. The Real Seed Company Nanda Devi The Real Seed Company Nanda Devi Genetics: Pure Himalayan Charas Cultivar (Kumaoni) Sex: Regular Grows: Greenhouse, Grows outdoors Harvest: Month Early October This is a new collection from Kumaon's greatest charas region around Nanda Devi: a line similar to, but even better than, the cultivar released as "Pahari Farmhouse". This Nanda Devi cultivar is from a unique valley high in the mountains and has an earlier finishing time and great mould and cold resistance. Above all these plants are uniquely aromatic and have a lovely soaring high. India's Kumaon Himalaya, formerly a part of the Kingdom of Nepal, is a mountain region which has a long tradition of producing potent charas. Good Kumaoni charas cultivars are vigorous, hardy plants, typically with a Christmas tree growth pattern. This Nanda Devi cultivar has long slender leaflets and a charming "sativa" appearance. Calyxes are very resinous, with a floral, tangy aroma and herbal, spicy scents. The best traditional charas twists from the Kumaon region have a very distinctive euphoric effect. This new Nanda Devi line has an uplifting and positive vibe that really stands out. "Sativa" lovers will really enjoy these plants. Product Tagssacred to a compassionate white-coloured form of the Mother Goddess. Bodhi Seeds Nepali Watermelon Hashplant Watermelon Hashplant is a Nepal highland Himalayan mountain sativa landrace personally collected at 2000 meters in the Mileche region of the Annapurna national forest. 18 individuals were openly pollinated to create these marijuana seeds. The beauty of Nepaliâs are their extreme hardiness and vigour, coupled with exotic floral and fruit terpene signatures, and a happy, joyful, elation in the head with a light warm ecstatic body high. This line is excellent on its own but will truly shine as a breeding tool to bring yield, structure, robustness, and heavenly aromas. She loves the sun best, but very adventurous growers may also cultivate her indoors, she will stretch quite a bit, but those arms with fill with many bud sites culminating in ripeness in 11-15 weeks. The size and shape of the buds comprised of the many foxtails is perfect for hand rubbing the finest hashish. Germination realities vary with landrace genetics, with a lower germ ratio yearly, these were tested recently at 85% or more. These cannabis seed projects were made in an organic biodynamic growing environment with the utmost care, respect, meditation, and good vibes, using the best parental selections from a small but amazing gene pool. Remember - landrace sativas need a good long cure to bring out their magic

A Hazy, Euphoric Energy BoosterBud BasicsNot yet as well-established in the 420 market as her parent strains, Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze Feminized still stands strong amongst the competition, brilliantly balancing the best genetics of her heritage to provide everything you could want from a qualitydaytime strain.Sativa-heavy, this Northern Lights #5 and Amnesia Haze cross still boasts just enough Sativa to ground and temper the energy-boosting feelings of euphoria that will arrive after a couple of tokes. She takes a little experience to manage the hefty weight of her colas, but some support is really all thatâs needed, as her height is in check and these all-fem seeds remove the requirement to weed out males.Flavor and Fragrance of Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze FeminizedPungent enough to fill a room with her scent in moments, Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze is abundant with the scent of sweet pine nuts, underpinned with faint citrus notes that are amplified once you light up.In flavor, these citrus notes are a delight for the palate, tropical in taste with subtle notes of herbs.EffectsIf youâre a toker with an active or busy lifestyle, Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze is the perfect daytime strain for you. As you might expect from a strain with Amnesia Haze genetics, the head high can be on the hazy side, leaving you feeling a tad dazed for a while.But donât worry - if youâve got a hefty to-do list, that heavy, dream-like sensation will subside.Once it does, youâll find yourself wrapped in a feeling of euphoria that brings to mind your happiest thoughts and memories, and a sensation of true serenity. And rest assured, though her Indica side keeps you collected, itâs not enough to sedate.Medical Uses of Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze FeminizedNorthern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze is as well-trusted in the medical scene as the two strains that make up her parentage, and her effects are as strong and appealing to the medicinal marijuana (MMJ) community.Where psychological ailments are concerned, this ganja can be of great therapeutic benefit for sufferers of mental health concerns such as stress, PTSD, anxiety and depression, in addition to being able to energize even the most exhausted sufferer of chronic fatigue.Since Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze Fem is a hybrid with muscle-relaxant properties, it is a potent enough analgesic to ease a variety of physical ailments, capable of providing comfort from the pain of migraines and PMS, muscle spasms and arthritis.As with many types of pot, a joint of this is likely to leave you with a chronic case of the munchies - but those hunger signals can be utilized by those suffering from eating disorders, and lack of appetite will quickly become a non-issue.Of course, there may be some unwanted side effects to this weed. Ensuring you consume only moderate amounts at a time is crucial, though dry eyes and cottonmouth are a likelihood regardless. However, in rarer cases, some tokers may experience headaches, dizziness, increased paranoia or heightened anxiety if too much is consumed.Growing Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze Feminized SeedsStructurally, Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze Feminized appears much as a Sativa, though slightly smaller (her maximum height is around 250 centimeters) - so vertical growing space shouldnât be too much of a concern. From her Indica heritage, this weed draws her resilience to molds, pests and diseases, but she most loved for her generous yield size.Since this plantâs colas are fairly large, her branches may need some support around the main limb holding the central flower in order for her not to be dragged down and damaged by her own weight - however, itâs still important to keep an eye on the plantâs lateral arms, as on occasion these may also need some aid.For indoor cannabis cultivators, hydroponics or organic soil will both work well and combined with a Screen of Green (SCROG) setup, this will dramatically boost bud production. To ensure she truly flourishes, make sure that her temperature is between 21Â° and 27Â°C at all times, and after 8 to 10 weeks of flowering, you should find yourself with a yield of up to 550 grams per square meter.If you prefer to grow your ganja outdoors, warm and sunny climes such as those in the Mediterranean are ideal. Sheâll grow just fine in the northern hemisphere if planted at the tight time, and harvest should be around October time when you can reap in a reward of 550 grams per plant.SummaryA plant with the potential to make serious waves in the cannabis community, thereâs no excuse not to grow your very own stash of Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze with feminized seeds, huge yields and the best of both Indica and Sativa growth characteristics.Sweet with citrus and pine notes, this herb will awaken the mind to bliss and euphoria, whilst keeping you grounded enough to go about your day with ease and energy, thanks to her Indica side.Since those very traits make this a therapeutically beneficial weed for both psychological and physical ailments, Northern Lights #5 x Amnesia Haze Femis very clearly just as much (if not more) than the sum of her parental parts.  Cannabis affects everyone differently. Your experience with this strain may not be the same as someone elseâs. Growing conditionsâincluding light, nutrients, and pot sizeâplay a major role in shaping the plantâs yield, potency, and flavor profile. Results will always vary based on how and where itâs grown.

Tempting & Tantalizing Tangy TastesBud BasicsA famously zesty Californian strain, Orange Skunk Feminized is well-loved not only in her home state, but across the world for her fruity orange aroma and tangy flavor, balanced by the complex notes she inherits from her Skunk #1 ancestry.First debuting to the cannabis community in the 90s, youâre unlikely to find a dispensary or coffeeshop thatâs without this wicked weed, and for growers looking to try new strains, now is the time to give this ganja a go, with seeds that are fully-feminized.Inheriting not only the delightfully fruity flavors of California Orange, but the clear-headed highs too, this herbalso develops into a calming body-buzz thatâs borrowed from parent Skunk #1 to create a well-balanced hybrid.Medically, the uplifting effects of this weed can work wonders for tokers seeking reprieve from psychological conditions such as stress, anxiety or depression - in addition to working to relieve pain for those with physical ailments.Growing this ganja is a simple enough affair, as though Sativa-leaning, this weed has a fast flowering time and yields a huge bounty. Indoor growers will have no trouble managing this strain, and those cultivating outdoors will find that sheâs hardier than she appears, capable of surviving cooler climates to still provide a hefty harvest.Flavor and Fragrance of Orange Skunk FeminizedConsidered in the cannabis community to be one of the most fragrant and delicious smelling strains available, Orange Skunk Feminized is an incredibly refreshing marijuana experience. Abundant with tangy citrus orange aromas that are perfectly tempered with skunky notes - this herb is a hit with veterans looking for a more complex, mature strain that still has all the modern fruitiness of a hybrid.In flavor, this skunky orange taste continues, delivering a smoke thatâs citric and musky, and leaves a spicy note on the tongue as you exhale.EffectsSativa-heavy with a moderate 14% THC content, Orange Skunk Fem is gentle enough in her mind to not overwhelm newbies, but still induces a strong feeling of euphoria that brings on waves of creative energy while honing your focus.Some tokers report this boost of concentration to be laser-like in its intensity and leaves you with a strong motivation to get shit done, since this herb also energizes and boosts vigor to encourage productivity.For office workers, this can be a great choice of strain, but for creative types, this herb is heaven itself, sure to act as a muse for your next masterpiece within a few tokes.As a mood enhancing strain, youâll struggle to keep a smile from your face for hours after a joint of Orange Skunk, as sheâll uplift you into a happy, cheerful state thatâs not only beneficial for the work day, but great in social situations.When the cerebral effects of these budsbegin to wind down, the Indica side will crank things up a little with a relaxing tingling sensation that begins at the back of your neck and works its way down to stretch across your body, calming you all over. In all likelihood, a long and restful sleep will follow this up.Still, side effects are always a possibility with all varieties of cannabis. This herb may bring on dry, bloodshot eyes and cottonmouth, but this can be avoided if you stay hydrated before, during and after smoking this stuff. In those more sensitive to THC or new to marijuana, these nugs could induce dizziness, increase anxiety or paranoia.Medical Uses of Orange Skunk FeminizedOrange Skunk Feminized can be effectively used by the medicinal marijuana(MMJ) communityto alleviate arthritis, muscle spasms, back pain, headaches and migraines due to the analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties this pot provides alongside her relaxing nature.For those with more psychological concerns than physical, the upbeat disposition and mood-enhancement that results from a joint of this ganja are more than satisfactory to temporarily relieve patients of stress, anxiety and depression by shifting the mind away from negative thoughts and ushering in more pleasant, happy ones.For those struggling with nausea or a lack of appetite (be that chemotherapy-induced or due to an eating disorder such as anorexia nervosa or bulimia), the strong hunger pangs induced by this cannabis can be an effective method for rebuilding appetite and restoring nutrition to the system.Growing Orange Skunk Feminized SeedsThough a Sativa-heavy hybrid, Orange Skunk Feminized has a quick flowering time and can thrive in almost any location - even when conditions are harsh - to yield a marvelous amount of marijuana that never fails to delight.As this plant matures, youâll notice that her dense, oval-shaped nugs are sticky with a thick layer of frosty trichomes across her amber pistils. Growing these beauties in colder conditions (particularly towards the end of the flowering period) can improve the bag appeal by turning that foliage a lovely purple-mauve shade that perfectly complements the strain's stunning green hues.Growing Orange Skunk indoors, cultivators should remember that to improve ventilation and light penetration, this plant requires regular pruning and trimming.With seeds that are already feminized for your convenience, thereâs no need to worry about removing males from your crops, and she blooms for between 8 and 10 weeks before maturing enough to be ready for harvesting. Final yields tend to be around 1.96 to 2.3 ounces of buds per square foot.Outdoor growers will find this plant thrives in a warm and sunny Mediterranean climate, but thatâs not to say that she wonât grow well in cooler temperatures, as she can tolerate colder northern weather well enough. In cooler settings, Orange Skunk Fem must be harvested by no later than the last week of November, in order to avoid frosty weather from damaging your crops. If all goes well, your yields will be surprisingly large - around 40.5 ounces of nugs per plant.SummaryEverything about Orange Skunk Feminized screams temptation, from her tantalizing and refreshing orange flavors and gently uplifting head-highs to her therapeutic benefits and easy to cultivate grow traits.Bursting with citrus and skunk flavors, a few tokes of this hone focus and induce a feeling of euphoria thatâs impossible not to enjoy. Sativa-leaning, this herb's Indica side still exerts itself to lower you down into relaxation, making for a pain-relieving effect for those looking for medical aid in their marijuana.For growers, why try to resist a weed thatâs this simple to grow? Though sheâs average sized, her yields are anything but average, and she responds well to an indoor or outdoor environment, so thereâs no need to set up any special circumstance for her to thrive.  Cannabis affects everyone differently. Your experience with this strain may not be the same as someone elseâs. Growing conditionsâincluding light, nutrients, and pot sizeâplay a major role in shaping the plantâs yield, potency, and flavor profile. Results will always vary based on how and where itâs grown.

Original Auto AK Cannabis Seeds by FastBuds Seeds Original Auto AK is an auto-flowering Cannabis strain by FastBuds seeds. It has been said that Original Auto AK is one of the most resilient auto-flowering strains that you can get. This strain is capable of growing indoors or outdoors, this is due to the pedigree genetics used in the breeding process. It is very easy to grow, making it a good choice for beginner growers. The THC level of this strain is up to 21%, so a fair punch packed in there. In just 9 weeks from seed, the plants will produce long and dense colas of citrusy, pine flavoured flowers. Despite the Sativa dominance, this strain is almost foolproof, if you need a high producer with a quick turnaround, then this is for you. This strain has some real old school bag appeal, the trichomes are eye-catching and have a silver shimmer. Very typical of Sativa, the buds that these seeds will produce are elongated and stacked together. The effects are also typical Sativa, energising, uplifting and invigorating. The edge is taken off the Sativa high with a mellowing body high. This strain aids creativity and is a good smoke for all manner of settings, whether it's social settings, a night out or something to keep you focused throughout the day, this is a good option. Original Auto AK has exceptional resistance to disease and produces impressive yields in challenging settings. The elongated colas will stretch the whole length of the branches. These plants grow homogeneous so they can be grouped closely together. Yields for this strain are around 400 - 500g/m2. As this is an auto-flowering strain, you can fit multiple harvests in per year, with little concern for mould or mildew. Growers who live in a wet climate or have short summers can still get the rewards of Original Auto AK. It has been advised that outdoor growers should plant this strain discreetly as she can be easily camouflaged. There will be resin hidden in the leaves so let none go to waste when the trim time comes. The predominant flavours of Original Auto AK are earthy, floral and pines, there are notes of lemon citrus in there too. Original Auto Amnesia Haze Cannabis Seeds by FastBuds Seeds Original Auto Amnesia Haze is a Cannabis strain bred by FastBuds Seeds that is dominant in Sativa. It is a high yielding, Haze dominant hybrid that takes only 70 days to complete flowering from seed. This strain grows with vigour and flowers showing off the Sativa dominance. It is a strain better suited to more experienced growers with large growing areas. The THC percentage of Original Auto Amnesia Haze can reach 22%. If you are growing outdoors, the breeder has recommended environments with a hot climate where this strain can reach its potential on both height and yield. Indoor growers who want big productive plants should give this strain a go. The buds of Original Auto Amnesia Haze are a lot more compact than regular Haze varieties, they are thick with dense calyxes all packed together. These large and chunky buds will be coated in resin with vibrant orange hairs. Original Auto Amnesia Haze's aroma is a blend of citrus, orange and tangerine with floral back notes. The effects are cerebral and motivating, followed by a lethargic and relaxed state of mind. Original Auto Amnesia Haze is a good strain for artists of all kinds as well as for other everyday activities. Some of the plants that result from these seeds will grow to be 150cm, one of the taller auto-flowering strains on the market. The plants will grow with wide spacing in between the nodes, while flowering she will develop a bushy and tall growth pattern, typical of a Sativa strain. The trichomes glisten and you will notice orange hairy pistils pushing out, during the final weeks the resin will spill out over to the surrounded leaves. Once the plants are ready to harvest, they will have a tall and chunky appearance. This strain is better suited to those who have experience with challenging Sativa/Haze varieties and those who understand plant training. LST & SOG are recommended by the breeder to optimise yields of this strain. Some staking and string will be required to keep these ladies from snapping. SnowHigh Seeds Original Haze x Lambsbread A Original Haze mother was combined with a heirloom Jamaican Lambsbread male. This is a pre-release of truly old heirloom genetics of very long flowering duration. Extreme patience is needed to grow and finish the Original Haze x Lambsbread, this will probably be the last strain to show sex or finish during a growing season outdoors and most likely will need a greenhouse or supplemental lighting to finish. The genetics contain many equatorial sativa types and flowering and finishing times are determined by its genetics over photoperiod. A good vegetative growth is required before flowering should be induced if indoors and 30 to 60 days is preferred and sometimes 90 days from seed optimally but required. In my experience allowing the plant from seed to mature fully before inducing flower will allow larger yields and less problems with growth and finishing further in its growth cycle. The Lambsbread line is a tightly kept strain which was preserved by Rastafarians for many years. Lambsbread was a favorite of Bob Marley which is said to be a hybrid of some of the first indentured Indian cannabis cultivars brought in from traveling sugar plantation workers in the 1800âs and other equatorial cannabis lines. This strain is not for the novice and should only be grown with experience or a lot of research and preparation to realize the full potential of the strain. Those who do partake in this strains journey will be transported back in time when cannabis enhanced the mind and creative thoughts and images manifested with chances of enlightenment and joy that is rarely perceived in most of todayâs cannabis strains. Flower time range 14 - 16 weeks with the possibility of some even longer phenotypes Pure Sativa hybrid of worked heirloom and landrace genetics Stretch 2 to 3x Resin production: good resin but small glands then what people expect from Indica hybrids, high resin production doesnât necessarily mean high potency. Odor: 5 Aroma: pheno dependent but citrus, grass and exotic spice notes have presented themselves in some phenos Flavor: 6 The flavor is more refined but delicious in its simplicity, hard to descriv Potency: 8-9 Duration of high: 4 to 6 hours depending on level of consumption High Type: Also pheno dependent but many layers of highs come on, some slight changes in perception come on immediately and build for up to an hour or more. The highs are trippy, soaring, colorful, and intense which can be paranoid inducing even in those accustomed to potent cannabis. Sativas of this caliber are best enjoyed without consuming other cannabis strains which contain CBD which modulate the high or basically bind to the THC and other psychoactive cannabinoids and synergistic terpenoids. In some cases of cannabis use its best not to consume other CBD rich strains or narcotic pain medications because of the binding to the CB1 receptors which can decrease the perceived potency of the strain. Also consuming edibles will detract from the best expressions of sativa strains like Original Haze x Lambsbread

Original Loud Cannabis Seeds by Loud Seeds The Original Loud F1 (AJs Sour Diesel crossed with Spicy Jack was the happy accident that started Loud Seeds). Loud is an interesting genetic cross in the sense that we isolated a phenotype that captures the best qualities of both strains. You get petrol, lemon, and Pez candy on the nose. The plant doubles in size from the time it starts flowering and when grown outdoors from seed it is not uncommon to see 12 foot tall plants. The Loud grows much denser than Sour Diesel from the Jack influence yet has the same initial characteristics and the same nutrient requirements as the Sour when grown properly. The crystal content is mind blowing even when using organics. Ed Rosenthal himself smiled and said this herb is quite amazing after chewing on a node for a minute or two
